description: Retrieval evaluation set. Each item has a question, the document that contains the answer, and a literal answer span. A retrieved chunk counts as relevant if it comes from expected_source AND contains answer_span (case-insensitive, whitespace-normalized). Span containment is used instead of chunk ids so the same ground truth works across different chunking configurations.

questions.question: How does the retriever rank document chunks?
questions.answer_span: Ranks by token overlap using Counter

questions.question: What API endpoint do I call to submit a query and get an answer?
questions.answer_span: Submit query and get answer with sources
